## PiPipeConfig interface

Runtime configuration for a `PiPipe` instance.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PiPipeConfig
```

## Remarks

`new PiPipe()` merges the provided partial config over the defaults returned by `loadConfig(process.env)`<!-- -->.
